texto: …The love of his youthAppeared as in a dreamAnd this ageing loverWent mad with love.The youth robbed him ofReason and his chastity.In pursuit of his Beloved, mad, deranged,He was from kith and kin estranged.The fire of the rose’s cheekBurnt the nightingale’s heart;The laughing flameTormented the devoted moth…
explicacao: Citação de Hafiz Shirazi sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “…The love of his youthAppeared as in a dreamAnd this ageing loverWent mad with love.The youth rob…” articula amor, longing, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
